name: harvest
short_effect: Has a 50% chance of restoring a used Berry after each turn if the Pokémon has held no items in the meantime.
effect_text: After each turn, if the last item this Pokémon consumed was a Berry and it is not currently holding an item, it has a 50% chance of regaining that Berry, or a 100% chance during strong sunlight.
flavor_text: May create another Berry after one is used.
